name: Theada's Beef Jerky
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut meat into 1/2" strips (or as thin as possible).
2. Remove all fat.
3. Boil for approximately 6 minutes to remove moisture from the meat.
4. Place on a cookie sheet in the middle of the oven set to 200°F.
5. Cook for 1-2 hours, cracking the oven door occasionally to allow moisture to escape.
6. Coat with Liquid Smoke and A-1 Sauce.
7. Store in an airtight jar.
